headline: AI Engineer
shortBio: Passionate software engineer with 13+ years of experience building scalable solutions. Specialized in React, Node.js, Python, and machine learning implementations.

children.text: I'm an engineer with a passion for creating innovative solutions that make a real impact. My journey in tech began over 13 years ago, and I've had the privilege of working with startups and established companies like FedEx, Hilton, ServiecMaster, and the City of Memphis.

My expertise spans across modern web technologies including React, Next.js, Node.js, and various cloud platforms. Recently, I've been focusing heavily on AI/ML integration, building intelligent applications that leverage the power of machine learning and agentic workflows.
When I'm not coding, you'll find me contributing to open-source projects and exploring the latest advancements in technology.
